change: Fast nominal branch (IMU+kin+imuint) + slow assist-calibration branch (EMA robot features only)
hypothesis: Assist features are causing low-frequency bias and phase-local troughs; separating timescales should fix plateau underprediction
success_criterion: Lower signed steady-state bias at lv4/lv7 without worse latency

change: Remove raw torque from fast branch; keep only slow torque/power summaries
hypothesis: Raw torque is being misused at 100 Hz and causes phase-locked dips
success_criterion: Reduced trough amplitude in level_100/125 assisted plateaus

change: Train LF target for slow branch and residual HF target for fast branch
hypothesis: Current failures are mainly low-frequency plateau bias while timing is already decent
success_criterion: Improved plateau MAE / signed bias with similar transition timing

change: Add low-derivative-window signed-bias loss or low-pass error loss
hypothesis: MAE/RMSE underweight the exact failure mode
success_criterion: Reduced steady-state signed error in assisted conditions

change: Auxiliary head for continuous assist-intensity proxy from allowed features
hypothesis: Model needs an internal variable for assistance state without using forbidden assist_level
success_criterion: Better calibration across lv0/lv4/lv7; better monotonicity of bias vs assist intensity

change: Balanced batches over assist level × condition × steady/transient regime
hypothesis: Current optimization may ignore underrepresented assisted plateaus
success_criterion: Less regression to average; improved worst-case condition metrics

change: Add steady plateau bias, onset error, decay error, cycle-synchronous error
hypothesis: Average MAE hides the actual trade-off between models
success_criterion: Cleaner selection of next model family

change: Check whether subject-wise affine layer helps only after timescale split
hypothesis: Affine calibration alone failed, but may help as a secondary correction after structure is fixed
success_criterion: Small extra gain after E1/E3, not before
